info.title: SS&C AI Gateway Security & Governance Platform
info.description: This is the API for SS&C AI Gateway, the AI security & governance platform

post.description: LLM Chat Completion grounded in Enterprise files data

post.summary: Fetch your chunks from the RAG-Postgres DB
post.description: Fetch your chunks from the RAG-Postgres DB that closely match your query

post.summary: Delete the existing file-ID from the RAG-Postgres DB within a specific tenant.
post.description: RAG Deregister File from Postgres API

get.summary: Lists specific files from Postgres and returns the unique FileID, for a specific Tenant and BU-ID combo.
get.description: List Registered Files within a tenant from the RAG-Postgres DB

post.summary: Inserts a RAG-config for a specific file into Postgres and returns the unique FileID.
post.description: Register a file-ingestion Config into the RAG-Postgres DB

post.summary: Upload File in chunks to RAG-Ingest (ganglia) service as a multipart/form-data
Check the status of a transcription request
Request/Response for Embeddings (using the new improved batch-request processing method)

get.description: Returns token and cost usage events for the authenticated tenant.
Returns aggregated token and cost usage grouped by provider, model, endpoint, or user.

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Repeat the parameter to group by multiple dimensions.

get.description: Returns line-item costs for a billing period.

400.description: Invalid JSON format or validation error

get.description: Get a single feedback by Tarvos ID
Get all feedbacks or a filtered list based on time range

post.summary: Detects PII patterns in the provided text and returns detection results.
post.description: Analyzes input text for sensitive data.

requestBody.description: Input text for PII detection. If 'is_chat_completion' is true, the input must contain 'messages' and 'model' fields following the OpenAI chat format. Otherwise, any schema is accepted. Will contain additional config hyperparameters for the underlying model in the future (TARVOS-456).

200.description: Detection result with a flag indicating if PII was found

post.summary: Detects prompt injection patterns in the provided text and returns detection results.
post.description: Analyzes input text for potential prompt injection attacks.

requestBody.description: Input text and isChatCompletion flag. Will contain additional config hyperparameters for the underlying model in the future (TARVOS-456).

200.description: Detection result with a flag and score

post.summary: Detects toxicity patterns in the provided text and returns detection results.
post.description: Analyzes input text for potential toxicity.

requestBody.description: Input text and isChatCompletion flag, will contain additional config hyperparameters for the underlying model in the future (TARVOS-456).

200.description: Detection result with a flag and score

post.summary: Make inferences from promptops endpoint using previously registered prompt-artifacts for a specific use-case.
post.description: Parse request-body and optional file-upload based on prompt_artifact_version_id, Hydrate the prompt-template, and invoke Structify Python gRPC service to get back a stringified JSON object.

get.summary: Generate the swagger-docs for a promptops using previously registered prompt-artifacts for a specific use-case.
get.description: Generate the swagger-docs for a specific use-case-ID based on previously registered prompt-artifacts.

prompt_injection.description: TARVOS-216 Chorus and Postman are breakingAWSBedrock       map[string][]AIGuardRailsAWSBedrock `json:"aws_bedrock,omitempty"`

include_stop_str_in_output.description: stop at the stop word but include it in the output

stop.description: response will stop when any of these words are returned

code.description: in cases we return 200 to user when the inference engine returns errors capture the code

message.description: in cases we return 200 to user when the inference engine returns errors capture the message

service_level_breach_after_ms.description: The user expects the request to be complete in this many milliseconds from request time. If failed report breach through metrics.

store.description: should the result be stored must be true when blocking is false

store_expire_ms.description: the amount of time before the stored result is removed, the result must be picked up by this time

terminate_after_ms.description: End the request if it runs longer then this many milliseconds after the computation starts

job_prefix.description: used so that directories do not grow unbounded

transcription.description: the transcription response is a single string

request.description: this is the actual request as the user submitted it

response.description: the job id fields are in this object

file_id.description: File ID that you retrieved from the rag/ingest/register API

file_end.description: Boolean flag indicating end of file
